conditions.text: action is authority-facing and no valid authority link exists
token/client binding is missing or ambiguous

branches.header: Return `DENY` if any of the following is true:

conditions.text: but the action is one of:
mark out-of-band submission as known truth
the actor may prepare but not approve the requested action
or a second-person approval policy applies
access is permitted only to a redacted projection

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Always first, before manifest allocation and before any non-access gate.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: ACCESS_GATE is outside the non-access monotone progression-rank contract.
notes: ACCESS_GATE uses the distinct authorization enum rather than GateDecisionRecord.
Pre-manifest access exits may terminate before RunManifest allocation.
GAP_ACCESS_REASON_CODES_NOT_ENUMERATED_IN_PRIMARY_GATE_SOURCE

phase_bindings.statement: access_decision = AUTHORIZE(principal, tenant_id, client_id, period, raw_requested_scope, mode, run_kind)

gates.purpose_or_intro: This gate remains special because it uses the actor-and-authority contract.
gates.rationale: `ACCESS_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.

notes: ACCESS_GATE is not serialized as GateDecisionRecord and therefore does not use the non-access severity enum.

terminalization_effects: Pre-manifest hard denial; execution stops before any manifest allocation.
Pre-manifest access exit; runtime cannot allocate a manifest until stronger authentication succeeds.
Pre-manifest access exit; approval flow must complete before execution can start.
Continue, but masking binds only downstream projection and export surfaces.
Proceed into manifest allocation and non-access gate planning.

conditions.text: `RunManifest.lifecycle_state != FROZEN` when `MANIFEST_GATE` is evaluated in the pre-seal chain
provider/environment refs required for the runtime scope are missing
any required top-level config-freeze completeness ref is missing
`required_config_types_present[]` is missing, incomplete, or does not match the mandatory config-type set required for the run
`required_config_types_present[]` does not match the de-duplicated config-type set actually present in `ConfigFreeze.entries[]`
`mode = COMPLIANCE` and `run_kind != REPLAY` and any frozen compliance-critical config is not `APPROVED`
`mode = COMPLIANCE` and `run_kind = REPLAY` and any frozen compliance-critical config is outside `{APPROVED, DEPRECATED, REVOKED}`
`run_kind = REPLAY` and any non-live frozen compliance config is present while the runtime scope still includes a filing-capable or amendment-capable live action token
`run_kind = REPLAY` and `replay_class in {STANDARD_REPLAY, AUDIT_REPLAY}` but `continuation_set.config_inheritance_mode != REPLAY_EXACT`
`run_kind = REPLAY` and `replay_class in {STANDARD_REPLAY, AUDIT_REPLAY}` but `ConfigFreeze.config_resolution_basis != REPLAY_EXACT_REUSE`
`run_kind = REPLAY` and `replay_class in {STANDARD_REPLAY, AUDIT_REPLAY}` but `continuation_set.input_inheritance_mode != REPLAY_EXACT`
`continuation_basis = RECOVERY_CHILD` but either config or input inheritance mode is not the exact recovery mode required for same-attempt replayable recovery
a required approval reference is missing for the requested run kind and frozen policy permits an override path
`run_kind = REPLAY` and one or more frozen compliance-critical config entries are `{DEPRECATED, REVOKED}` but the replay carve-out is valid and no live filing-capable progression is requested

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Ordered pre-seal gate; runs on the frozen manifest before seal.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: Same-manifest retry reuses persisted pre-seal gate records after seal.
Pre-seal PASS_WITH_NOTICE posture remains binding after seal.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Evaluate the ordered pre-seal gate chain, persist pre-start blocked context if needed, and seal only when a new pre-start context was built
phase_bindings.statement: gate_manifest = MANIFEST_GATE( manifest, cfg_freeze, input_freeze, manifest.schema_bundle_hash, PROVIDER_ENVIRONMENT_REFS(collection_boundary) )

gates.purpose_or_intro: Ensure the manifest envelope is fully frozen, internally complete, and valid for seal.
gates.rationale: `MANIFEST_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Blocks seal and terminalizes the pre-start path; legal continuation requires remediation or a child/replay lineage.
Blocks seal until a valid in-scope override is active for this gate.
Allows seal while preserving auditable notice posture for later TRUST_GATE and FILING_GATE consumption.
Allows the pre-seal chain to continue toward a complete ready-to-seal tape.

conditions.text: required authoritative schema is missing from the frozen bundle
`SourcePlan`, `SourceWindow`, `CollectionBoundary`, or `NormalizationContext` fails validation against its declared schema
an authoritative artifact references a schema outside the frozen bundle
required field missing, unknown enum value, or undeclared field exists after schema closure
incompatible artifact-version mix violates bundle compatibility rules
artifact envelope lacks required contract identity (`schema_id`, `semantic_version`, `dialect_ref`, `schema_bundle_hash`, `artifact_content_hash`, `writer_build_id`)
`input_freeze.artifact_contract_refs[]` does not include the frozen `SourcePlan`, `SourceWindow`, `CollectionBoundary`, and `NormalizationContext` contract refs
`input_freeze.artifact_contract_hash` does not match recomputed contract hash across intake-boundary and intake-data artifacts
an authoritative artifact uses a deprecated but still allowed schema version inside an explicit compatibility window
a backward-compatible minor-version skew exists across independent artifact families and is permitted by frozen policy

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Ordered pre-seal gate; runs after MANIFEST_GATE and before seal.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: Pre-seal PASS_WITH_NOTICE posture remains binding after seal.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Evaluate the ordered pre-seal gate chain, persist pre-start blocked context if needed, and seal only when a new pre-start context was built
phase_bindings.statement: gate_contracts = ARTIFACT_CONTRACT_GATE( schema_bundle, source_plan, source_window, collection_boundary, normalization_context, source_record_set, evidence_item_set, candidate_fact_set, conflict_set, canonical_fact_set, snapshot, input_freeze )

gates.purpose_or_intro: Ensure both intake-boundary artifacts and intake-data artifacts conform to the frozen versioned schema bundle before they become authoritative for compute, parity, trust, filing, or graphing.
gates.rationale: `ARTIFACT_CONTRACT_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Blocks seal and terminalizes the pre-start path; legal continuation requires remediation or a child/replay lineage.
Allows seal while preserving auditable notice posture for later TRUST_GATE and FILING_GATE consumption.
Allows the pre-seal chain to continue toward a complete ready-to-seal tape.

canonical_inputs: explicit exclusion / confirmed-no-data / missing / stale declarations

conditions.text: required source classes for the requested scope were never evaluated
input boundary is missing for a compliance run
any required domain lacks one explicit frozen posture in `source_domain_postures[]`
gate evaluation consults raw connector deltas or a fresher boundary snapshot instead of `InputFreeze`
frozen scope includes explicit exclusions affecting a filing-critical domain
non-filing-critical exclusions exist inside the frozen boundary
stale but non-critical sources are declared inside the frozen boundary

prelude.text: Post-seal late-data discovery SHALL NOT be judged here; it SHALL instead be passed into
`FILING_GATE` as `late_data_status` together with the applicable ordered
`late_data_policy_bindings[]` for the affected frozen source bindings.
That handoff SHALL come from a persisted `LateDataMonitorResult`, not a fresh ad hoc scan of raw
connector state at gate time.

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Ordered pre-seal gate; runs after artifact-contract validation and before seal.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: Post-seal late data is judged by FILING_GATE via LateDataMonitorResult, not re-evaluated here.
Pre-seal MANUAL_REVIEW or PASS_WITH_NOTICE posture remains binding after seal.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Evaluate the ordered pre-seal gate chain, persist pre-start blocked context if needed, and seal only when a new pre-start context was built

gates.purpose_or_intro: Ensure the data population in scope is frozen, explicitly classified per source domain, and not drifting during the run.
gates.rationale: `INPUT_BOUNDARY_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Blocks seal and terminalizes the pre-start path; legal continuation requires remediation or a child/replay lineage.
Allows seal, but the unresolved review posture remains binding after seal and caps later automation.
Allows seal while preserving auditable notice posture for later TRUST_GATE and FILING_GATE consumption.
Allows the pre-seal chain to continue toward a complete ready-to-seal tape.

conditions.text: validation has a filing-critical structural error
or required critical domain exists only as provisional facts
or only non-blocking critical warnings exist
and either `conflict_resolution_frontier = MONITORING_ONLY` or non-critical warnings or partial domains remain

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Ordered pre-seal gate; runs last in the canonical pre-seal tape before seal.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: Pre-seal MANUAL_REVIEW or PASS_WITH_NOTICE posture remains binding after seal.
OVERRIDABLE_BLOCK is explicitly available for bounded low-quality or stale-critical posture.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Evaluate the ordered pre-seal gate chain, persist pre-start blocked context if needed, and seal only when a new pre-start context was built

gates.purpose_or_intro: Convert completeness, validation, freshness, and conflict metrics into an execution decision.
gates.rationale: `DATA_QUALITY_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Blocks seal and terminalizes the pre-start path; legal continuation requires remediation or a child/replay lineage.
Blocks seal until a valid in-scope override is active for this gate.
Allows seal, but the unresolved review posture remains binding after seal and caps later automation.
Allows seal while preserving auditable notice posture for later TRUST_GATE and FILING_GATE consumption.
Allows the pre-seal chain to continue toward a complete ready-to-seal tape.

conditions.text: any filing-critical evidence path is erased
any filing-critical path survivability falls below `path_survivability_min_audit`
required evidence is retention-limited in a way that prevents lawful or defensible submission
or `limitation_clarity_ratio < limitation_clarity_min_submit` with explicit limitation notes but no silent ambiguity
or critical paths exist but rely heavily on inferred links
or stale decisive targets exist but policy allows scoped human waiver before rebuild
or a critical path is limited but still explainable with explicit limitation notes
evidence paths exist for all critical figures
but non-critical limitations materially affect reviewer confidence
or only non-critical stale or limited proof posture exists with explicit limitation notes
or `weighted_path_survivability >= path_survivability_min_submit` and `limitation_clarity_ratio = 1` but non-critical limitations still remain visible

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Runs once proof and graph evidence exist; appends post-seal without rewriting the frozen pre-seal tape.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: Retention limitations remain explicit reason-coded posture rather than hidden score discounting.

phase_bindings.statement: gate_retention = RETENTION_EVIDENCE_GATE( graph.quality.graph_quality_score, graph.quality.critical_path_coverage, graph.quality.critical_retention_limited_count, graph.quality.critical_evidence_erased_count, DERIVE_WEIGHTED_PATH_SURVIVABILITY(graph), DERIVE_LIMITATION_CLARITY_RATIO(graph), DERIVE_CRITICAL_SILENT_LIMITATION_COUNT(graph), DERIVE_NONCRITICAL_SILENT_LIMITATION_COUNT(graph), graph.quality.inferred_critical_path_ratio, graph.quality.proof_bundle_coverage, graph.quality.unsupported_critical_target_count, graph.quality.contradicted_critical_target_count, graph.quality.stale_critical_target_count, graph.quality.replay_failure_target_count, graph.integrity_summary.open_critical_target_count, graph.integrity_summary.missing_proof_bundle_target_count, DERIVE_CRITICAL_EXPLANATION_FAILURE_COUNT(graph), DERIVE_NONCRITICAL_EXPLANATION_FAILURE_COUNT(graph) )

gates.purpose_or_intro: Ensure required evidence is still available and sufficiently direct for the requested action.
gates.rationale: `RETENTION_EVIDENCE_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Terminalizes the current progression path; legal continuation requires remediation or a new child lineage.
Blocks progression until a valid in-scope override is active for the unresolved prerequisite.
Routes into reviewer-facing progression without allowing straight-through automation.
Allows progress, but notice posture remains explicit and auditable downstream.
Allows the next ordered gate or live authority progression to continue automatically.

conditions.text: (`parity_classification = BLOCKING_DIFFERENCE` and no valid approved parity override exists)
or (`parity_classification = NOT_COMPARABLE` and comparison is mandatory for the requested scope)
(`parity_classification = MATERIAL_DIFFERENCE` and at least one critical field is affected)
or (`parity_classification = BLOCKING_DIFFERENCE` and policy allows scoped parity override and no approved override is yet active)
(`parity_classification = MATERIAL_DIFFERENCE` and only non-critical comparison fields are affected)
or (`parity_classification = NOT_COMPARABLE` and comparison is desirable but not mandatory)

`parity_classification = MATCH` `comparison_set_state = INVALID` SHALL already be serialized by `ParityResult` as `parity_classification = NOT_COMPARABLE`, `parity_score = 0`, and `dominant_reason_code = PARITY_COMPARISON_SET_INVALID`; `PARITY_GATE` SHALL preserve that fail-closed posture instead of softening it into a local-match heuristic.

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Runs after retention evidence once comparison artifacts exist.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: Comparison-set invalidity must remain fail-closed as NOT_COMPARABLE.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Authority context, comparison basis, parity, and parity gate

gates.purpose_or_intro: Decide whether the internal result can be used as-is, must be reviewed, needs override, or is blocked when compared against authority or filing-baseline values.
gates.rationale: `PARITY_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Terminalizes the current progression path; legal continuation requires remediation or a new child lineage.
Blocks progression until a valid in-scope override is active for the unresolved prerequisite.
Routes into reviewer-facing progression without allowing straight-through automation.
Allows progress, but notice posture remains explicit and auditable downstream.
Allows the next ordered gate or live authority progression to continue automatically.

canonical_inputs: current upstream gate progression cap derived from the upstream non-access gate decisions

conditions.text: synthesized trust artifact is missing, superseded, or not bound to the current manifest scope
synthesized trust artifact is internally inconsistent under the frozen trust formulas or claims automation/readiness above the current upstream gate progression cap

synthesized trust artifact omits the persisted `score_band`, `cap_band`, `upstream_gate_cap`, or `trust_input_basis_contract{...}`, `trust_sensitivity_analysis_contract{...}`, or decisive `blocking_dependency_refs[]` required to explain a stale, reviewed, or blocked posture

branches.header: Return `HARD_BLOCK` if any of the following is true:

conditions.text: any upstream gate returned `OVERRIDABLE_BLOCK` and no valid approved override is active
one or more unresolved pre-trust human steps remain

branches.header: Return `MANUAL_REVIEW` if no higher-severity condition matched and any of the following is true:

conditions.text: a valid approved override is active but no unresolved review/block condition remains
trust output carries non-blocking notice-only reason codes

branches.header: Return `PASS_WITH_NOTICE` if no higher-severity condition matched and any of the following is true:

conditions.text: no unresolved pre-trust human steps remain
no valid approved override is active

branches.header: Return `PASS` if and only if all of the following are true:

prelude.text: `TRUST_GATE` SHALL NOT invent a new override family. It may surface `OVERRIDABLE_BLOCK` only when an already-documented upstream gate has an unresolved scoped-override requirement. Trust-derived red or insufficient-data posture is not itself a new discretionary override path.

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Runs after parity and upstream non-access gate posture are available.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: TRUST_GATE freezes the current upstream gate cap and may not exceed that persisted progression ceiling.
notes: TRUST_GATE may surface override-missing posture only when an already-documented upstream gate remains unresolved.
Trust-derived red posture is not a new discretionary override family.
TRUST_GATE may only mirror unresolved upstream override posture, never invent a synthetic trust override family.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Trust synthesis and command-side case state

gates.rationale: `TRUST_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Terminalizes the current progression path; legal continuation requires remediation or a new child lineage.
Blocks progression until a valid in-scope override is active for the unresolved prerequisite.
Routes into reviewer-facing progression without allowing straight-through automation.
Allows progress, but notice posture remains explicit and auditable downstream.
Allows the next ordered gate or live authority progression to continue automatically.

conditions.text: `(confirmed_final_baseline and exact_scope_baseline and window_open and not material_amendment_basis)`

branches.header: Return `MANUAL_REVIEW` if any of the following is true:
Return `PASS_WITH_NOTICE` if any of the following is true:

conditions.text: `(RetroactiveImpactAnalysis is NONE or fully bounded and already incorporated into the current continuation path)`

prelude.text: Evaluate conditions strictly in descending severity order: `HARD_BLOCK` > `OVERRIDABLE_BLOCK` > `MANUAL_REVIEW` > `PASS_WITH_NOTICE` > `PASS`. Each bullet below is parenthesized as a complete condition against the authorized amendment runtime scope. Define these boolean shorthands before evaluating the table:
`submit_scope = (authorized amendment token = amendment_submit)`
`intent_scope = (authorized amendment token = amendment_intent)`
`confirmed_final_baseline = persisted confirmed final-declaration baseline exists`
`exact_scope_baseline = persisted exact-scope DriftBaselineEnvelope exists`
`window_open = amendment window is open`
`out_of_band_baseline_unresolved = amendment targets unresolved out-of-band baseline truth`
`baseline_review_only_cap = amendment_eligibility_contract.baseline_progression_ceiling_or_null = REVIEW_ONLY`
`baseline_reconcile_first_cap = amendment_eligibility_contract.baseline_progression_ceiling_or_null = RECONCILE_FIRST`
`authority_prerequisites_ready = all required authority preconditions are present`
`freshness_stale_for_submit = submit_scope and amendment-readiness freshness state = STALE`
`material_amendment_basis = drift materiality classification not in {NO_CHANGE, BENIGN_DRIFT} or explicit authority-state divergence exists`
`intent_required_but_incomplete = submit_scope and intent-to-amend is required but not yet completed in current or prior manifest lineage`
`retroactive_prework_required = RetroactiveImpactAnalysis requires replay, prior-position restatement, or authority reconciliation`
`unresolved_source_contradiction = contradictory drift or authority sources remain unresolved`
`additional_validation_review = additional validation errors remain unresolved`
`intent_flow_may_begin = intent_scope and no amendment_readiness_context is yet present`
`partial_scope_only = amendment is eligible but only a subset of authorized runtime scope is amendable`
`supersedes_prior_chain = a same-scope prior amendment chain or bundle will be superseded if this path continues`

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Runs only when runtime_scope[] includes amendment_intent or amendment_submit; a narrow early-failure amendment-basis branch may emit before parity/trust.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: AMENDMENT_GATE is deliberately not evaluated during drift preparation.
The gate is the only family allowed to speak for intent-to-amend readiness failure.
A narrow early-failure amendment-basis exception may emit AMENDMENT_GATE before the ordinary parity/trust sequence.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Authority context, comparison basis, parity, and parity gate
phase_bindings.statement: amendment_gate = AMENDMENT_GATE( baseline, amendment_window.window_state, drift.materiality_class, drift.difference_classes, retroactive_impact, amendment_case.freshness_state, amendment.intent_status if exists(amendment.intent_status) else amendment_case.lifecycle_state, authority_state, runtime_scope, amendment_readiness_context=amendment_calc )

amendment_gate = AMENDMENT_GATE( baseline, amendment_window.window_state, drift.materiality_class, drift.difference_classes, retroactive_impact, amendment_case.freshness_state, amendment.intent_status if exists(amendment.intent_status) else amendment_case.lifecycle_state, authority_state, runtime_scope, amendment_readiness_context=LOAD_READINESS_CONTEXT(amendment_case) if exists(amendment_case.readiness_context_ref) else None )

decisive_amendment_gate = AMENDMENT_GATE( baseline, amendment_window.window_state, drift.materiality_class, drift.difference_classes, retroactive_impact, amendment_case.freshness_state, amendment_case.lifecycle_state, authority_state, runtime_scope, amendment_readiness_context=amendment_calc )

gates.purpose_or_intro: Determine whether an amendment journey may begin or progress.
gates.rationale: `AMENDMENT_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Terminalizes the current progression path; legal continuation requires remediation or a new child lineage.
Blocks progression until a valid in-scope override is active for the unresolved prerequisite.
Routes into reviewer-facing progression without allowing straight-through automation.
Allows progress, but notice posture remains explicit and auditable downstream.
Allows the next ordered gate or live authority progression to continue automatically.

canonical_inputs: filing packet state, if a packet has been prepared
declaration-basis acknowledgement state, which may be `NOT_APPLICABLE` on a legitimate pre-packet path
`late_data_policy_bindings[]` for the affected frozen source bindings
optional `filing_readiness_context` from pre-packet filing preparation, including:
calculation refs / basis refs when applicable

conditions.text: access gate decision is not `ALLOW` or `ALLOW_MASKED` as appropriate
filing packet is missing and there is no active pre-packet readiness context and no unresolved upstream gate posture that legitimately explains the pre-packet branch

a prepared filing packet is present but omits packet-local readiness lineage required for the selected filing path, or an approved packet path depends on notice settlement that has not been sealed into a packet-bound `FilingNoticeResolution`
trust exists but is superseded, not bound to the current manifest scope, or `trust_currency_state = RECALC_REQUIRED`
obligation or tax-year context does not support the requested submission
amendment requested without an eligible baseline
any filing-critical late-data event after seal maps to a frozen source binding whose `late_data_policy_ref = SPAWN_CHILD_MANIFEST`
controlling proof bundle is missing where filing posture exists

branches.header: Return `HARD_BLOCK` if any of the following is true:

conditions.text: any upstream gate returned `OVERRIDABLE_BLOCK` and no valid approved override is active
filing depends on a scoped approved override not yet granted

branches.header: Return `OVERRIDABLE_BLOCK` if no higher-severity condition matched and any of the following is true:

conditions.text: any filing-critical late-data event after seal maps to a frozen source binding whose `late_data_policy_ref = REVIEW_IF_LATE`
one or more filing-critical targets is `STALE` but not policy-routed to mandatory rebuild
explanation rendering failed for the controlling filing proof

branches.header: Return `MANUAL_REVIEW` if no higher-severity condition matched and any of the following is true:

conditions.text: `filing_readiness_context.validation_outcome = PASS_WITH_NOTICE` and no filing packet has yet been prepared
`filing_notice_steps[]` is non-empty and every unresolved step is packet-local
trust or parity emitted non-blocking notices
a valid approved override is active and contributed to filing-capable progression
only non-critical late-data exists and every affected source binding has `late_data_policy_ref = EXCLUDE_LATE`

branches.header: Return `PASS_WITH_NOTICE` if no higher-severity condition matched and any of the following is true:

notes.text: `declared_basis_ack_state = NOT_APPLICABLE` on a legitimate pre-packet branch SHALL not by itself create block or review
a missing filing packet is legal only on an explicit pre-packet readiness branch
when a filing packet exists, the packet contract is the source of truth for packet-local legality; operator or client UI state SHALL remain explanatory only
a stale or invalidated trust artifact SHALL hard-block at `FILING_GATE`; filing-capable paths must resynthesize trust before they may proceed

a valid approved override may unblock a scoped prerequisite, but it SHALL NOT upgrade the current filing decision above `PASS_WITH_NOTICE`; the gate SHALL emit explicit override-dependent notice reason codes and audit follow-up actions When multiple frozen source bindings are affected by late data, the gate SHALL evaluate each binding independently and return the highest-severity aggregate decision.

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Runs when runtime_scope[] includes prepare_submission, submit, or amendment_submit; early pre-trust or pre-packet branches still require an explicit filing gate record.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: FILING_GATE is an explicit monotone narrowing stage that may reduce inherited progression rank but may not upgrade it.
notes: FILING_GATE is monotone narrowing and SHALL NOT upgrade inherited legal progression.
A valid approved override may unblock a scoped prerequisite but SHALL NOT upgrade the filing decision above PASS_WITH_NOTICE.
FILING_GATE may appear on early filing-readiness failure branches before full trust synthesis completes.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Authority context, comparison basis, parity, and parity gate
phase_bindings.statement: early_filing_gate = FILING_GATE( access_decision, manifest.lifecycle_state, mode, None, None, upstream_gate_records=non_access_gate_records, obligation_status=OBLIGATION_STATUS(authority_state), filing_packet_state=None, authority_link_state=authority_link_state, approval_state=pretrust_approval_state, declared_basis_ack_state=NOT_APPLICABLE, runtime_scope=runtime_scope, amendment_posture=None, overrides=LOAD_OVERRIDES(active_override_refs), filing_notice_steps=[], late_data_status=late_data_status, late_data_policy_bindings=late_data_policy_bindings, filing_readiness_context=filing_calculation, trust_currency_state=NOT_APPLICABLE_PRETRUST, trust_currency_reason_codes=[] )

phase_bindings.phase_name: Authority calculation, filing readiness, packet preparation, and filing gate
phase_bindings.statement: filing_gate = FILING_GATE( access_decision, manifest.lifecycle_state, mode, trust, parity, upstream_gate_records=non_access_gate_records, obligation_status=OBLIGATION_STATUS(authority_state), filing_packet_state=None, authority_link_state=authority_link_state, approval_state=pretrust_approval_state, declared_basis_ack_state=NOT_APPLICABLE, runtime_scope=runtime_scope, amendment_posture=amendment_case if exists(amendment_case) else amendment, overrides=LOAD_OVERRIDES(active_override_refs), filing_notice_steps=[], late_data_status=late_data_status, late_data_policy_bindings=late_data_policy_bindings, filing_readiness_context=None, trust_currency_state=trust_currency.state, trust_currency_reason_codes=trust_currency.reason_codes )

phase_bindings.phase_name: Authority calculation, filing readiness, packet preparation, and filing gate
phase_bindings.statement: filing_gate = FILING_GATE( access_decision, manifest.lifecycle_state, mode, trust, parity, upstream_gate_records=non_access_gate_records, obligation_status=OBLIGATION_STATUS(authority_state), filing_packet_state=None, authority_link_state=authority_link_state, approval_state=pretrust_approval_state, declared_basis_ack_state=NOT_APPLICABLE, runtime_scope=runtime_scope, amendment_posture=amendment_case if exists(amendment_case) else amendment, overrides=LOAD_OVERRIDES(active_override_refs), filing_notice_steps=[], late_data_status=late_data_status, late_data_policy_bindings=late_data_policy_bindings, filing_readiness_context=None, trust_currency_state=trust_currency.state, trust_currency_reason_codes=trust_currency.reason_codes )

phase_bindings.phase_name: Authority calculation, filing readiness, packet preparation, and filing gate
phase_bindings.statement: filing_gate = FILING_GATE( access_decision, manifest.lifecycle_state, mode, trust, parity, upstream_gate_records=non_access_gate_records, obligation_status=OBLIGATION_STATUS(authority_state), filing_packet_state=None, authority_link_state=authority_link_state, approval_state=pretrust_approval_state, declared_basis_ack_state=NOT_APPLICABLE, runtime_scope=runtime_scope, amendment_posture=amendment_case if exists(amendment_case) else amendment, overrides=LOAD_OVERRIDES(active_override_refs), filing_notice_steps=[], late_data_status=late_data_status, late_data_policy_bindings=late_data_policy_bindings, filing_readiness_context=filing_calculation, trust_currency_state=trust_currency.state, trust_currency_reason_codes=trust_currency.reason_codes )

phase_bindings.phase_name: Authority calculation, filing readiness, packet preparation, and filing gate
phase_bindings.statement: filing_gate = FILING_GATE( access_decision, manifest.lifecycle_state, mode, trust, parity, upstream_gate_records=non_access_gate_records, obligation_status=OBLIGATION_STATUS(authority_state), filing_packet_state=packet.lifecycle_state, authority_link_state=authority_link_state, approval_state=approval_state, declared_basis_ack_state=declared_basis_ack_state, runtime_scope=runtime_scope, amendment_posture=amendment_case if exists(amendment_case) else amendment, overrides=LOAD_OVERRIDES(active_override_refs), filing_notice_steps=filing_notice_steps, late_data_status=late_data_status, late_data_policy_bindings=late_data_policy_bindings, filing_readiness_context=filing_calculation if exists(filing_calculation) else None, trust_currency_state=trust_currency.state, trust_currency_reason_codes=trust_currency.reason_codes )

gates.rationale: `FILING_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Terminalizes the current progression path; legal continuation requires remediation or a new child lineage.
Blocks progression until a valid in-scope override is active for the unresolved prerequisite.
Routes into reviewer-facing progression without allowing straight-through automation.
Allows progress, but notice posture remains explicit and auditable downstream.
Allows the next ordered gate or live authority progression to continue automatically.

canonical_inputs: authority preflight token/client binding check result
authority preflight declared-basis-ack validity check result
existing submissions for the same authority meaning

conditions.text: authority preflight reauthorization decision is not in `{ALLOW, ALLOW_MASKED}`
authority preflight token/client binding check failed
authority preflight declared-basis-ack validity check failed
filing packet manifest-binding hash does not equal the expected manifest-binding hash
idempotency key collides with a different packet body
a confirmed submission already exists for the same obligation and the current transmit is not an eligible amendment progression
runtime scope includes `amendment_submit` but amendment posture is absent or not in `READY_TO_AMEND`
submission recovery or reconciliation is required before transmit
the exact same packet and idempotency key already exist in a safe retriable state and the engine will perform idempotent recovery rather than a blind resend

gates.evaluation_scope_condition: Runs immediately before transmit when live submission is actually attempted.
gates.monotone_progression_rank_behavior: Inherited non-access monotone-min contract from section 7.1; later gates may narrow but never raise legal progression.
notes: Submission preflight re-runs authorization and authority-binding validity immediately before transmit.

phase_bindings.phase_name: Submission enqueue, governed transmit, inbox-normalized recovery, and bounded reconciliation
phase_bindings.statement: submission_gate = SUBMISSION_GATE( packet.payload_hash, packet.manifest_binding_hash, expected_packet_manifest_binding_hash, request.idempotency_key, EXISTING_SUBMISSIONS(client_id, operation), binding, request.request_body_hash, packet.lifecycle_state, runtime_scope, amendment_case if exists(amendment_case) else amendment )

gates.rationale: `SUBMISSION_GATE` is normalized from the canonical gate tables into one implementation-grade registry row.
terminalization_effects: Terminalizes the current progression path; legal continuation requires remediation or a new child lineage.
Routes into reviewer-facing progression without allowing straight-through automation.
Allows progress, but notice posture remains explicit and auditable downstream.
Allows the next ordered gate or live authority progression to continue automatically.

gate_record_invariants: `gate_stage_index` SHALL persist the fixed stage order rather than requiring replay consumers to infer order from `gate_code` after post-seal appends
`effective_scope[]` SHALL be the canonical authorized runtime scope snapshot used by the gate, frozen as an ordered scope-token array with the reporting-scope token first
`input_artifact_refs[]` and `decision_basis_ref` SHALL preserve the frozen inputs and derived basis actually evaluated by the gate; a gate record SHALL NOT rely on an ad hoc metrics map alone
`prerequisite_gate_refs[]` SHALL be empty only for `MANIFEST_GATE`; every later gate SHALL cite at least one earlier gate record that formed part of its prerequisite posture

`override_resolution_state` plus `active_override_refs[]` SHALL distinguish override-independent progress from pass / notice / review outcomes that only became legal because a valid override was active

`gate_semantics_contract{ contract_version, evaluation_order_profile_code, reason_order_profile_code, severity_profile_code, decision_rank, progression_rank, blocking_class, progression_semantics, override_dependency_state }` SHALL freeze the deterministic severity/rank mapping and whether progression was override-independent, valid-override-governed, still override-missing, or override-forbidden
`dominant_reason_code` SHALL be one of the emitted `reason_codes[]` and SHALL identify the highest-priority reason from the most severe matched decision family
`plain_explanation` SHALL explain the decision in bounded operator language without requiring the reviewer to reconstruct threshold or dependency state from raw metrics alone

`decision_explainability_contract{ contract_version, grammar_profile_code, reason_order_policy, dominant_reason_selection_policy, summary_source_policy, compression_policy, ordered_reason_codes[], dominant_reason_code, compressed_reason_codes[], suppressed_reason_count, semantic_qualifiers[], action_projection_state, plain_text_field_name, plain_text_character_limit }` SHALL freeze the backend-authored explanation boundary used by gate records, trust summaries, and terminal bundles
`blocking_dependency_refs[]` SHALL cite the missing, stale, superseded, or otherwise decisive dependencies whenever the gate outcome depends on specific upstream artifacts or approvals

override_resolution_rule.text: `VALID_OVERRIDE_ACTIVE(...)` SHALL be evaluated only for a gate whose own `decision = OVERRIDABLE_BLOCK`.
A gate whose own `decision = HARD_BLOCK` SHALL NOT consult override state and SHALL remain blocking.
Any implementation path that progresses the current manifest after a `HARD_BLOCK` SHALL be treated as a fatal conformance error.
